name: LangChain
description: Framework for developing applications powered by language models. Connects LLMs to external data, tools, and agents.

name: Liquid Foundation Models
description: Compact, efficient foundation models built on Liquid Neural Networks. State-space models that outperform transformers at smaller sizes.

name: MIT 6.S191 — Introduction to Deep Learning
description: MIT's official introductory course on deep learning. Open courseware with labs covering CNNs, RNNs, GANs, reinforcement learning, and more.

name: Liquid Neural Networks
description: Open-source implementation of Liquid Time-Constant networks — continuous-time neural networks inspired by biological neurons.

name: Suno AI
description: AI music generation from text. Type a description, get a full song with vocals, instruments, and production. Used by millions.

name: MosaicML / DBRX
description: Open-source efficient LLM training platform. DBRX is a 132B MoE model rivaling GPT-3.5. Acquired by Databricks for $1.3B.

name: nanoGPT
description: The simplest, fastest repository for training/finetuning medium-sized GPTs. Reproduces GPT-2 (124M) in ~$20 of compute.

name: llm
description: CLI tool for interacting with Large Language Models. Supports OpenAI, Claude, local models via plugins. Log and search prompts.

name: v0 by Vercel
description: AI-powered UI generation. Describe a component in natural language, get production-ready React/Tailwind code. Uses LLMs for code generation.

name: DocETL
description: AI-powered data processing pipelines for unstructured documents. LLM-driven extraction, transformation, and analysis at scale.

name: tinygrad
description: A tiny neural network framework. Under 1000 lines of code, supports GPU acceleration. The antithesis of PyTorch complexity.

name: openpilot
description: Open-source self-driving system by comma.ai. Runs on supported cars with a $200 device. 10,000+ users driving daily.

name: Chain-of-Thought Research
description: Pioneering research on chain-of-thought prompting, instruction tuning, and emergent abilities of large language models at OpenAI.

name: Stable Diffusion
description: Open-source text-to-image diffusion model that democratized AI image generation. Runs locally on consumer GPUs and powers thousands of apps.

name: Scale AI Data Platform
description: Enterprise data labeling and AI infrastructure platform. Powers training data for OpenAI, Meta, and US DoD with human-in-the-loop annotation at scale.

name: Hugging Face Transformers
description: The most popular open-source library for state-of-the-art NLP, vision, and audio models. Hosts 500K+ models and 100K+ datasets. The GitHub of machine learning.

name: Pioneer Fund
description: AI-first venture fund and talent accelerator co-founded with Nat Friedman. Finds and funds the most ambitious AI builders globally using AI-powered scouting.

name: AI Grants & Investments
description: Portfolio of AI investments and open-source contributions. Co-leads Pioneer Fund. Previously acquired GitHub for Microsoft and shipped Copilot.

name: OpenAI Cookbook & DevRel
description: Built OpenAI's developer ecosystem from scratch. Created the OpenAI Cookbook with 200+ examples, grew the API community to millions of developers.

name: Latent Space & smol.ai
description: Latent Space is the leading AI engineering podcast and newsletter. smol.ai builds small, useful AI developer tools. Defined the AI Engineer role.

name: fast.ai
description: Free deep learning courses and the fastai library. Made cutting-edge deep learning accessible to anyone who can code. Used by hundreds of thousands of students.

name: ML Paper Explanations (YouTube)
description: YouTube channel with 250K+ subscribers explaining cutting-edge ML papers. Co-created OpenAssistant, an open-source ChatGPT alternative.

name: Replit
description: AI-powered coding platform used by 30M+ developers. Features Replit Agent for building full-stack apps from natural language prompts in the browser.

name: OpenAI API Platform
description: Built and scaled OpenAI's API platform serving GPT-4, DALL-E, and Whisper to millions of developers. Architected the product powering ChatGPT.

name: OpenAI Engineering
description: Co-founded OpenAI and led engineering from GPT-1 through ChatGPT and GPT-4. Built the infrastructure and team behind the most impactful AI products.

name: Thinking Machines Lab
description: AI research startup founded after departing OpenAI as CTO. Led the technical development of ChatGPT, GPT-4, and DALL-E at OpenAI.

name: Snorkel AI
description: Data-centric AI platform. Write labeling functions instead of hand-labeling data. Used by Google, Apple, Intel, and government agencies.

name: Weights & Biases
description: ML experiment tracking, model versioning, and dataset management. The MLOps platform used by OpenAI, DeepMind, and 500K+ ML practitioners.

name: Cleanlab
description: Open-source tool to find and fix label errors in datasets. Implements confident learning — automatically detects noisy labels in any ML dataset.

name: Neurala Brain Builder
description: Edge AI platform for visual inspection and anomaly detection. Lifelong-learning neural networks that improve in production without retraining from scratch.

name: DataRobot
description: Enterprise AutoML platform. Automates model building, deployment, and monitoring. Serves Fortune 500 companies from Boston headquarters.

name: Lunit INSIGHT
description: AI-powered cancer detection in chest X-rays and mammography. FDA-cleared, CE-marked, deployed in 4000+ hospitals across 50+ countries.

name: Cohere
description: Enterprise LLM platform built by a Transformer paper co-author. RAG, embeddings, and language understanding for enterprise search and generation.

name: Run:ai
description: GPU orchestration platform for AI workloads. Fractional GPUs, dynamic scheduling, and cluster management. Acquired by NVIDIA in 2024.

name: Allen AI (AI2)
description: Nonprofit AI research lab founded by Paul Allen. Builds open-source AI tools: Semantic Scholar, OLMo, AI2 THOR. Mission: AI for the common good.

name: Semantic Scholar
description: AI-powered academic search engine by Allen AI. Indexes 200M+ papers with AI-generated TLDRs, citation contexts, and research recommendations.

name: Lexion AI
description: AI contract management for enterprises. Uses NLP to extract key terms, track obligations, and automate legal document workflows.

name: OLMo
description: Fully open language model from Allen AI. Open training data (Dolma), open code, open weights, open evals. Making LLM science reproducible.

name: Xnor.ai (acquired by Apple)
description: Ultra-efficient edge AI. Ran deep learning on $5 solar-powered chips using binary neural networks. Acquired by Apple for $200M in 2020.

name: Mighty AI (acquired by Uber)
description: Training data platform for autonomous vehicles. Computer vision annotation at scale for self-driving cars. Acquired by Uber ATG in 2019.

name: Textio
description: Augmented writing platform. NLP predicts how language performs in job posts, emails, and business writing. Used by Fortune 500 for inclusive hiring.

name: Megatron-LM
description: NVIDIA's framework for training large transformer language models efficiently across thousands of GPUs using model and data parallelism.

name: PyTorch
description: The most widely used open-source deep learning framework. Provides dynamic computation graphs, GPU acceleration, and a rich ecosystem for research and production.

name: Hugging Face Transformers
description: The definitive open-source library for state-of-the-art NLP, vision, and multimodal models. Provides 200K+ pretrained models and unified APIs.

name: DeepMind Robotics Research
description: Pioneering continual learning and sim-to-real transfer for embodied agents. Research on navigation, manipulation, and lifelong learning.

name: Stable Diffusion / FLUX
description: Latent diffusion models for high-resolution image synthesis. Stable Diffusion democratized AI art; FLUX is the next-generation architecture from Black Forest Labs.

name: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
description: The original RAG framework combining retrieval and generation for knowledge-intensive NLP. Now a foundational pattern used across the LLM ecosystem.

name: LoRA
description: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models. The most widely adopted parameter-efficient fine-tuning method, reducing trainable parameters by 10,000x.

name: bitsandbytes / QLoRA
description: Efficient 4-bit quantization library enabling fine-tuning of 65B parameter models on a single 48GB GPU. QLoRA made LLM fine-tuning accessible to everyone.

name: FlashAttention
description: IO-aware exact attention algorithm that is 2-4x faster and uses 5-20x less memory. Now integrated into PyTorch and used by virtually all LLM training runs.

name: Mamba
description: Selective state space model architecture offering linear-time sequence modeling. Achieves transformer-quality performance with 5x faster inference throughput.

name: Craiyon (DALL-E Mini)
description: Open-source text-to-image model that went viral in 2022. Demonstrated that AI image generation could be accessible and fun for millions of users.

name: Hugging Face Spaces & Demos
description: Interactive ML art demos and creative AI tools on Hugging Face Spaces. Bridging the gap between generative AI research and creative communities.

name: Qwen
description: Alibaba's family of large language and multimodal models. Qwen2 series achieves top performance among open-weight models across benchmarks.

name: Reka AI Models
description: Multimodal AI models from Reka AI. Reka Core, Flash, and Edge deliver frontier performance across text, image, video, and audio understanding.

name: PaLM Training Infrastructure
description: Scaling infrastructure behind Google's PaLM model. Achieved efficient training of 540B parameter models across 6144 TPU v4 chips.

name: LAION-5B Dataset
description: The largest openly available image-text dataset with 5.85 billion CLIP-filtered pairs. Enabled training of Stable Diffusion and open CLIP models.

name: Open Assistant
description: Community-driven open-source project to create a free, high-quality chat assistant dataset and model. One of the earliest open RLHF efforts.

name: Circuits / Mechanistic Interpretability
description: Pioneering research on understanding neural networks by reverse-engineering their internal mechanisms. Published the influential Circuits thread on Distill.

name: Lil'Log
description: Comprehensive technical blog covering LLMs, diffusion, RL, and more. The most widely cited personal ML blog, serving as a reference for researchers worldwide.

name: Contextual AI RAG 2.0
description: Enterprise RAG platform that goes beyond naive retrieval. Contextual AI builds RAG-native language models trained end-to-end for grounded generation.

name: DSPy
description: Programming framework for optimizing LLM pipelines. Replaces hand-written prompts with composable, learnable modules that auto-optimize via compilation.

name: ALiBi Positional Encoding
description: Attention with Linear Biases enables transformers to generalize to longer sequences than seen during training without learned position embeddings.

name: Machine Learning Mastery
description: The largest practitioner-focused ML education platform with 1000+ tutorials and 20+ books covering deep learning, NLP, computer vision, and time series.

name: Build a Large Language Model From Scratch
description: Hands-on book and code repository teaching LLM internals from the ground up. Covers pretraining, fine-tuning, and RLHF with clear PyTorch implementations.

name: Pinecone AI Education & Canopy
description: Developer education content and open-source RAG framework for Pinecone. Tutorials on vector search, embeddings, and building production RAG systems.

name: sentence-transformers
description: The most popular library for computing dense vector representations of text. Powers semantic search, clustering, and similarity across millions of applications.

name: TRL (Transformer Reinforcement Learning)
description: Hugging Face library for training language models with RLHF, DPO, and PPO. The standard open-source toolkit for alignment fine-tuning.

name: Hugging Face Inference Endpoints
description: Production deployment platform for transformer models. One-click deployment of any Hugging Face model with auto-scaling and optimized inference.

name: Diffusers
description: Hugging Face library for state-of-the-art diffusion models. Provides pretrained pipelines for image, audio, and 3D generation with simple APIs.

name: timm (PyTorch Image Models)
description: The definitive collection of state-of-the-art computer vision model implementations. 800+ pretrained models including EfficientNet, Vision Transformers, and ConvNeXt.

name: GPT-NeoX / Pythia
description: EleutherAI's open-source large language model suite. Pythia provides 16 model checkpoints (70M-12B) for scientific study of LLM training dynamics.

name: Together AI Platform
description: Cloud platform for training, fine-tuning, and running open-source AI models. Offers the fastest inference for Llama, Mixtral, and other open models.

name: Mistral AI Models
description: Open-weight frontier models from Europe. Mistral 7B, Mixtral 8x7B, and Mistral Large compete with models 10x their size through architecture innovations.

name: Sakana AI — Evolutionary Model Merging
description: Nature-inspired AI research lab using evolutionary algorithms to automatically merge and create new foundation models without training from scratch.

name: Imbue AI Agents
description: AI systems that reason about code and build software autonomously. Imbue trains models optimized for practical reasoning and agent capabilities.

name: Adept ACT-1
description: AI model trained to use software tools like a human. ACT-1 can navigate web browsers, use spreadsheets, and operate enterprise software via natural language.

name: Runway Gen-3
description: AI-powered creative suite for video generation and editing. Gen-3 Alpha produces photorealistic video from text and image prompts with fine temporal control.

name: Midjourney
description: The world's most popular AI image generation platform. Known for stunning artistic quality and used by millions of creators, designers, and artists.

name: Jasper AI
description: AI content generation platform for enterprise marketing teams. Used by 100K+ businesses to create on-brand copy, blog posts, and campaigns at scale.

name: Covariant Brain
description: Universal AI for robotic manipulation. The Covariant Brain enables robots to pick, place, and handle novel objects in real-world warehouse and logistics settings.

name: Character.AI
description: Platform for creating and chatting with AI characters. Over 20M monthly users interact with millions of user-created AI personalities and assistants.

name: Inflection Pi / Microsoft AI
description: Personal AI assistant designed for emotional intelligence and natural conversation. Pi pioneered empathetic AI before Mustafa moved to lead Microsoft AI.

name: Perplexity AI
description: AI-native answer engine with real-time web search and citations. Redefining search by providing direct, sourced answers instead of link lists.

name: Pika
description: AI video generation platform that creates and edits cinematic videos from text, images, and existing clips. Known for intuitive creative controls.

name: ElevenLabs Voice AI
description: Most realistic AI voice synthesis platform. Offers voice cloning, text-to-speech in 29 languages, and AI dubbing used by creators and enterprises worldwide.

name: AssemblyAI Universal-2
description: State-of-the-art speech-to-text API with speaker diarization, sentiment analysis, and summarization. Universal-2 model achieves best-in-class accuracy.

name: Deepgram Nova-2
description: Enterprise speech AI platform with real-time transcription, custom vocabulary, and language understanding. Nova-2 delivers industry-leading speed and accuracy.

name: Synthesia EXPRESSIVE-1
description: AI video generation platform creating realistic presenter-led videos from text. Used by 50K+ companies for training, marketing, and internal communications.

name: Photoroom
description: AI photo editing app that instantly removes backgrounds, generates product images, and creates studio-quality visuals. Used by 150M+ people globally.

name: Ideogram
description: AI image generation platform known for reliable text rendering in images. Ideogram 2.0 sets the standard for typography accuracy in generated visuals.
